No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on educational administration research and does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus does not contain any terms or concepts related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly focuses on 'Educational Administration' and 'policy issues,' aiming to develop professionals capable of improving educational systems, policies, and practices, directly aligning with multiple targets of Quality Education.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The syllabus provides no evidence, explicit or inferred, linking the course to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.
